summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 of 40 listed PRs; hydrated non-security PRs are independent inventory items with no shared canonical. Thirteen security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling. The remaining refs are blocked on missing live preflight state and target_updated_at.
